# ClearLedger Solutions

> ClearLedger Solutions is a professional bookkeeping, tax preparation, and QuickBooks consulting firm headquartered in Dallas, Texas. Founded by JJ, a certified QuickBooks ProAdvisor, ClearLedger serves small and mid-size businesses across Texas, Oklahoma, Florida, Louisiana, Mississippi, New Mexico, and Panama with comprehensive financial management services.

## About

ClearLedger Solutions provides expert bookkeeping, tax preparation, payroll processing, and QuickBooks consulting for businesses across multiple industries. The company holds QuickBooks Online Advanced Certified ProAdvisor, QuickBooks Desktop Certified ProAdvisor, and QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise certifications. ClearLedger was recognized as a 2024 and 2025 Top 25 Up-N-Coming ProAdvisor.

- Headquarters: Dallas, Texas
- Service Area: Texas, Oklahoma, Florida, Louisiana, Mississippi, New Mexico, Panama
- Specialization: Bookkeeping, QuickBooks, Tax Preparation, Payroll, Financial Advisory
- Certifications: QuickBooks Online Advanced Certified ProAdvisor, QuickBooks Desktop Certified ProAdvisor, QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise Certified
- Awards: 2024 & 2025 Top 25 Up-N-Coming ProAdvisor

## Services

- [Bookkeeping Services](https://www.yourclearledger.com/bookkeeping): Full-service bookkeeping including monthly reconciliation, financial statement preparation, and accounts management for businesses of all sizes.
- [QuickBooks Services](https://www.yourclearledger.com/quickbooks-services): QuickBooks setup, training, migration, cleanup, and ongoing support from certified ProAdvisors for both Online and Desktop editions.
- [Monthly Management](https://www.yourclearledger.com/monthly-management): Ongoing monthly financial management including bank reconciliation, categorization, reporting, and compliance monitoring.
- [Billing & Accounts Payable](https://www.yourclearledger.com/billing-accounts-payable): End-to-end accounts payable and receivable management, invoice processing, and payment tracking.
- [Cleanup & Advisory](https://www.yourclearledger.com/cleanup-advisory): QuickBooks file cleanup, catch-up bookkeeping, and financial advisory services for businesses with disorganized records.
- [Check Ordering](https://www.yourclearledger.com/check-ordering): Secure business check ordering with multiple styles, security features, and fast delivery.
- [Tax Preparation](https://www.yourclearledger.com/services): Business and individual tax preparation, quarterly estimated taxes, and Texas Franchise Tax filing.
- [Payroll Processing](https://www.yourclearledger.com/services): Full-service payroll processing including tax withholding, direct deposit setup, and compliance reporting.

## Locations

- [Dallas Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/dallas-bookkeeping): Professional bookkeeping services in Dallas, Texas, the company's primary market.
- [DFW Metro Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/dfw-bookkeeping): Serving the entire Dallas-Fort Worth metropolitan area with comprehensive financial services.
- [Fort Worth Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/fort-worth-bookkeeping): Bookkeeping and QuickBooks services for Fort Worth businesses.
- [Plano Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/plano-bookkeeping): Financial management services for businesses in Plano, Texas.
- [Frisco Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/frisco-bookkeeping): Bookkeeping services for the rapidly growing Frisco, Texas market.
- [McKinney Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/mckinney-bookkeeping): Professional bookkeeping for McKinney, Texas businesses.
- [Arlington Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/arlington-bookkeeping): Bookkeeping and financial services for Arlington, Texas.
- [Texas Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/texas-bookkeeping): Statewide bookkeeping services across Texas.
- [Oklahoma Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/oklahoma-bookkeeping): Bookkeeping services for Oklahoma businesses.
- [Florida Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/florida-bookkeeping): Remote bookkeeping services for Florida businesses.
- [Louisiana Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/louisiana-bookkeeping): Bookkeeping and financial management for Louisiana businesses.
- [Mississippi Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/mississippi-bookkeeping): Professional bookkeeping for Mississippi businesses.
- [New Mexico Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/new-mexico-bookkeeping): Bookkeeping services for New Mexico businesses.
- [Panama Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/panama-bookkeeping): International bookkeeping services for Panama-based businesses.

## Industries

- [Restaurant Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/restaurant-bookkeeping): Specialized bookkeeping for restaurants and food service businesses including tip tracking, food cost analysis, and POS integration.
- [Construction Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/construction-bookkeeping): Job costing, progress billing, and financial management for construction companies and contractors.
- [Real Estate Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/real-estate-bookkeeping): Property management accounting, rental income tracking, and financial reporting for real estate firms.
- [Medical Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/medical-bookkeeping): HIPAA-aware financial management for medical and dental practices.
- [Technology Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/technology-bookkeeping): Financial management for technology companies including SaaS revenue recognition and R&D tracking.
- [Manufacturing Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/manufacturing-bookkeeping): Cost accounting, inventory management, and financial reporting for manufacturers.
- [Energy Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/energy-bookkeeping): Specialized bookkeeping for energy, oil, and petrochemical companies.
- [Hospitality Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/hospitality-bookkeeping): Financial management for hotels, resorts, and tourism businesses.
- [Agriculture Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/agriculture-bookkeeping): Farm and ranch financial management, crop tracking, and agricultural tax compliance.
- [Golf Course Bookkeeping](https://www.yourclearledger.com/golf-course-bookkeeping): Specialized accounting for golf courses and country clubs.

## Blog

- [How to Choose the Right Bookkeeping Company in Dallas, TX](https://www.yourclearledger.com/blog/how-to-choose-bookkeeping-company-dallas): A comprehensive guide for Dallas business owners evaluating bookkeeping firms.
- [QuickBooks Online vs Desktop: Which Is Right for Your Business in 2026?](https://www.yourclearledger.com/blog/quickbooks-online-vs-desktop-2026): Expert comparison of QuickBooks editions with recommendations by business type.
- [Texas Franchise Tax: What Every Business Owner Needs to Know](https://www.yourclearledger.com/blog/texas-franchise-tax-guide): Complete guide to Texas Franchise Tax obligations, deadlines, and filing requirements.
- [Fix Messy QuickBooks in 30 Minutes](https://www.yourclearledger.com/blog/fix-messy-quickbooks-30-minutes): Step-by-step QuickBooks cleanup guide for common bookkeeping errors.
- [Small Business Bookkeeping Checklist 2026](https://www.yourclearledger.com/blog/small-business-bookkeeping-checklist-2026): Essential monthly and quarterly bookkeeping tasks for small business owners.
- [How Often Should You Reconcile Bank Accounts?](https://www.yourclearledger.com/blog/how-often-reconcile-bank-accounts): Best practices for bank reconciliation frequency and process.
- [10 Signs Your Business Needs a Bookkeeper](https://www.yourclearledger.com/blog/10-signs-your-business-needs-a-bookkeeper): Key indicators that a business should hire professional bookkeeping help.
